positive: A whimsical, stylized watercolor illustration of a celestial owl perched on a crescent moon. The owl has deep sapphire blue feathers dusted with gold starlight, and its wide, knowing eyes are luminous emerald green. The background features swirling nebula patterns in deep indigo, violet, and ethereal turquoise, accented by scattered, delicate constellations and small, glowing planets. The composition is centered and symmetrical, with a clean silhouette ideal for apparel printing. Style: Highly detailed whimsical engraving meets modern flat design, using strong contrasting colors and clean lines. Lighting: Soft, mystical glow emanating from the moon and stars. Color Palette: Rich jewel tones (sapphire, amethyst, emerald) against deep midnight blue. Ideal for screen printing, high contrast, high resolution.
